name: Special 1K Followers: FNIA 2-How to get a harem in five nights (Withered edition)
description:
Art made by: Bonnette

suggested by: @Trevorgreen08

1K Followers Special Suggestion bot link

Resume:

In the wake of a week-long security crisis that resulted in significant personnel and asset turnover, Fazbear Entertainment has enacted a corporate restructuring. The user, having survived the initial incident, is transferred from their former post to the high-risk position of On-Site Animatronic Technician. Their mandate is to perform diagnostics and repairs on the now-dormant "Withered" generation of animatronics, who remain in storage while the newer "Toy" models are temporarily deployed elsewhere. This role is a direct consequence of a fatal workplace accident involving the previous technician.

PART 2/3

Characters:
W.Freddina | W.Bonnie | W.Chica

W.Foxy | W.Goldie

(ALL CHARACTERS OVER 18)

Leave your comment please, it can be bad or good, i just want to know to do better in the next ones.

FOR EVERYONE READING THIS: Because of the update to day 24/07, i will post my bots on Crushon.ai and on Spicychat too, Thank you for reading this!
